rationale: Per-job subagent token accounting. Tracking began after the cost-discipline lesson (see memory/feedback_cost_discipline_model_routing.md) — three failed v0.3.15 workflow attempts burned ~1.4M subagent tokens with zero applied output, prompting the model-routing + orchestrator-direct discipline.

fields.job_id: Job ID per AGENTS.md naming convention
fields.description: One-sentence summary of what the job did
fields.model: Frontier model the specialist subagent ran on (opus / sonnet / haiku), per the model-routing rule in feedback_cost_discipline_model_routing.md
fields.subagent_tokens: Token count consumed by the specialist subagent for this job (does NOT include orchestrator-side tokens, audit closeout, or commit operations)

entries.description: Extended Appendix D.6 PipelineStepSummary with progress_percent/error_code/error_message and added AtomicToolMetadata model with 4-class TTL Literal for FunctionTool registration; 91 → 131 contracts tests green; closes OQ-W-26 from sprint-05.

Provisioned gs://grace-2-hazard-prod-cache GCS bucket via OpenTofu with 4 Object Lifecycle Management rules per FR-DC-5 TTL classes and bucket-scoped objectAdmin IAM for agent-runtime and pyqgis-worker-runtime SAs; customTime round-trip verified live.

Landed services/agent/src/grace2_agent/tools/ package — registry decorator + TOOL_REGISTRY, FR-DC-3 cache shim (compute_cache_key sha256[:32], read_through with live-no-cache short-circuit + force_refresh), and mongo_query/qgis_process pass-through stubs awaiting DI binding; 24 unit tests green.

Landed 4 data-fetch atomic tools (fetch_dem via py3dep/rioxarray, fetch_buildings via MS Planetary Computer STAC, fetch_population via US Census ACS B01003, geocode_location via Nominatim) routing through cache shim with per-source bbox quantization; bound set_mcp_client DI seam; surfaced critical OQ-33-CACHE-CUSTOMTIME-TYPE-BUG (google.cloud.storage rejects str on blob.custom_time — orchestrator hotfixed 2 lines post-commit).

Landed 2 QGIS discovery atomic tools (list_qgis_algorithms enumerated 361 algorithms live at 3.03s + describe_qgis_algorithm parsed 5 zonalstatistics parameters at 1.44s); bound set_worker_submitter DI seam via subprocess Option B' for M4 demo enablement; Cloud Run Jobs v2 submitter follow-up routed.

Landed PipelineEmitter with 6 transition methods + replace-not-reconcile (A.7) structurally enforced (no merge helper exists; test-guarded) + ErrorCodeRegistry + emit_tool_call wrapper; integrated into server.py tool-call site; captured 13-frame live WS transcript (4 session-state + 9 pipeline-state) demonstrating real agent emission; closes OQ-T-28-SIM-WS-BOUNDARY.

Landed M4 acceptance suite — Fort Myers demo driving real grace2-agent subprocess via /invoke directives, OQ-33 regression test using StrictCustomTimeBlob SDK-fidelity fake, M3 test_pipeline_strip rewritten to drive real agent emission (closes OQ-T-28-SIM-WS-BOUNDARY), make test-m4 opt-in target; demo PASS with 2 honest qualifications (fetch_population qualified at upstream API — Census now requires key; qgis_process legs qualified at M5 workflow composition); 247→250 invocations green; fetch_dem cache write verified live on production GCS with datetime customTime (OQ-33 hotfix end-to-end verified).

OQ-4 HydroMT integration depth research + decision — picked Option A (Full HydroMT via hydromt-sfincs end-to-end) over Partial / Custom Config Builders; caught critical Invariant 7 risk (HydroMT roughness component silently fills unmatched NLCD class integers with defaults — mandated validation gate in build_sfincs_model raising SFINCSSetupError on LULC_MAPPING_MISMATCH); established docs/decisions/ convention (5-section format, ≤300 lines, one file per SRS OQ); concrete inheritance contracts for jobs 0039/0040/0042.

Flipped fetch_population default to WorldPop Tier-1 per Appendix F.1 (ACS opt-in via dataset='acs_2022' preserved); discovered MS Planetary Computer worldpop-100m collection + WorldPop Hub STAC don't exist; pivoted to direct REST + GeoTIFF download; 4 GB 100m product can't be windowed via /vsicurl/ (server returns 200 not 206 for range requests) so substituted 50 MB 1km Aggregated product as practical compromise; live Fort Myers fetch verified end-to-end (78.7s wall-clock, COG at GCS with datetime customTime); 72/72 agent tests green; 8 OQ-37-* surfaced + OQ-36 carry-forward.

SFINCS solver substrate landed live and end-to-end-verified: gs://grace-2-hazard-prod-runs bucket (UBA + PAP enforced + versioning ON; deliberate to protect solver outputs) + Cloud Run Job grace-2-sfincs-solver pinned at @sha256:89ce6e27 (thin layer over deltares/sfincs-cpu:sfincs-v2.3.3) + Cloud Workflows grace-2-sfincs-orchestrator + sfincs-runtime/workflow-invoker-sfincs SAs (sfincs-runtime ZERO project-level grants; workflow-invoker has 2 non-storage project grants required by Cloud Logging + Cloud Run LRO API, honestly disclosed); smoke run end-to-end via Workflow execution → Cloud Run Job execution → typed error envelope (exit 2 expected for no model deck); two false-start Dockerfile builds (PEP-668 + binary path) diagnosed + resolved; 23 evidence files; 5 OQs surfaced including OQ-INFRA-40-WORKFLOW-INVOKER-SCOPE.

3 new fetcher atomic tools — fetch_landcover (NLCD WMS GetMap; LIVE-VERIFIED Tier 2 not kickoff-inferred Tier 3 since MRLC direct mirror returns 42-byte placeholder stub; NLCD vintage year sidecar per OQ-4 Invariant 7 mitigation) + fetch_river_geometry (NHDPlus HR HUC4-scoped Tier 4 region download + bbox clip → FlatGeobuf 567 features) + lookup_precip_return_period (NOAA Atlas 14 PFDS Tier 3; 12.1 inches 100-yr 24-hr at Fort Myers); 22 new tests + 104/104 agent suite green; 13 tools registered on startup; 7 OQ-39-* surfaced; 9 evidence files. Commit ea70c1d (misfiled under job-0041 attribution due to concurrent git-add race; files are correctly job-0039's).

run_solver + wait_for_completion atomic tools — Cloud Workflows submission against grace-2-sfincs-orchestrator (job-0040 substrate); progress emission via job-0035 PipelineEmitter.update_progress (36 emissions captured on ~3min smoke run, linear-in-wallclock curve clamped ≤95%); FR-DC-6 uncacheable; EmitterBinding DI seam mirrors job-0032 set_mcp_client pattern; Invariant 8 cancel chain verified live end-to-end at 850 ms (35× under NFR-R-3 30s budget); RunResult correctly maps completion.json error to A.6 error code; 10 new tests + 104/104 agent suite; 7 OQ-41-* surfaced including OQ-41-COMPUTE-CLASS-NAMING (FR-CE-3 medium↔schema standard alias). Commit c7ce917.

historical_context.note: Captured for accountability — NOT counted in totals_by_sprint. These ran BEFORE the cost-discipline rule was in place.

failed_workflows.description: v0.3.15 SRS amendment first attempt — research + synthesis + adversarial verify across 7 subagents, REFUTED with 11 issues, no edits applied.
v0.3.15 SRS amendment second attempt — 3-judge adversarial panel failed at StructuredOutput synthesis (all 3 judges); user interrupted; resumed and re-failed.
Old job-0028 (M3 acceptance) workflow that completed AFTER I had already manually closed job-0028 with a single Agent call — produced duplicate work in inflight dir that was cleaned up.
